programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Must Eat Sugar, Molly's Fave Desserts
programme.desc: Molly is sharing some of her all-time best dessert recipes...from cookies to squares and definitely donuts in between. Duh!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Middle Italy
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's old band stops by the farm for a home-cooked meal. For her music-loving friends, Molly makes Orecchiette with broccolini and sausage, and a simple escarole salad with artichokes and tangy lemon dressing.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Double Birthday Party
programme.desc: One of Molly Yeh's best friends is in town for their birthdays, so Molly is making her most-delicious party bites for the double celebration.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Molly makes a delicious buffet spread for her sister-in-law's baby shower. The menu includes 'walking' fish tacos with crunchy cabbage slaw and cilantro dressing and pigs in a blanket with harissa ketchup and honey mustard.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Meals: Cowboy Style
programme.desc: Ree makes homemade takeout for lunch, with tex-mex fried rice and cowboy chopped salad. For dinner, it's smothered pork chops with smashed red potatoes and sliced tomatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Middles
programme.desc: Ree celebrates her middle children Paige and Bryce, with three snapshots of food and fun over a week while the other kids are away. She's making their favorite food starting with cornmeal pancakes with blueberry syrup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Oh, Baby
programme.desc: There's a new baby on the ranch, so Ree Drummond is taking a trip down memory lane and preparing a new-mom care package full of dishes she was given and plenty of pampering goodies. She includes her friend Beth's brisket, as well as funeral potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: For Pete's Sake
programme.desc: Ree prepares carnitas, mango salad, and a cheesy refried bean casserole.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 9
programme.desc: Ree shares ideas for four family meals with help from her kid film crew. Ree's husband and his father drop by to share speedy mini sloppy joe sliders. Then Ree makes shortcut Hawaiian chicken bowls, meatless sheet pan gnocchi and lemon shrimp alfredo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dorm Room Dining
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing some great ideas for simple, minimal-prep dorm room food made with basic tools, such as waffle maker pizzas, paninis and quesadillas. Next, she shows how to use a zipper bag to make a great Caesar salad.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Grandma's Grocery Games
programme.desc: Four seasoned and spunky grandmothers show Guy Fieri how it's done! In the first round, the judges hand out samples that the chefs must include in a version of their grandkids' favorite dish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: A Culinary Spelling Bee
programme.desc: Four chefs put their culinary and spelling skills to the test in the alphabetically enticing game, ABC. The second game has our chefs rummaging through bins to make a show-stopping starter in Clearance Carts.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Let Them Eat Toast
programme.desc: Four chefs must make French toast in aisle down without the key component. Nest up, the can can where chefs are challenged to make steak dinner with only canned goods.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Four Weddings and a Grocery Game
programme.desc: For these chefs getting married, the challenge comes when they have to make their sweetheart's favourite dish while on a budget. They'll head over to the frozen section for the appetizer and then find something to create a delicious reception dinner.

programme.title: Around the Horn

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodile Coast

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: Welcome to the Wolf Sanctuary
programme.desc: Matt and Lorin run a sanctuary for rescued wolves and struggling combat veterans. Matt and the team rescue Sadira, a grey wolf out of a backyard in Oregon, while US Army veteran Albert joins the team as he tries to mend his relationship with his family.

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: A Wolf Romance
programme.desc: When a nearby animal sanctuary with over 400 animals is threatened by a California wildfire, the LARC team races into the flames to assist in the evacuation. A tumor is discovered on LARC's elder statesmen, an almost 20-year old wolf named Blade.

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: The Heart of a Wolf
programme.desc: Matt and the veterans are called in when a neglected and aggressive wolfdog named Apache needs to be removed from the rough conditions of a suburban neighborhood home. Apache quickly finds comfort at LARC, and the love and companionship of a female wolf.

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: Wolf on the Loose
programme.desc: Reports of a loose wolf in a small California town sends Matt and the veterans on a massive rescue operation to safely secure the wolf before trouble arises. Thompson works with a coyote named Lichen to help him get through a period of personal turmoil.

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: Operation Wolfguard
programme.desc: Matt and the team head to Montana on a three-month undercover mission to find and document illegal wolf poaching in the rough terrain of the Bitterroot Valley. The team builds a custom enclosure for two wolves that are bonded for life.

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: Wolves in the Wild
programme.desc: Veteran Josh tries to muster up the courage to build a relationship with an aggressive wolfdog named Apache. The team continues with Operation Wolfguard, even as they grow frustrated with the pace of progress on their anti-wolf poaching mission.

programme.title: Wolves and Warriors: Wolf Rescue Mission
programme.desc: Matt spearheads a round-the-clock operation to rescue an estimated 60 wolves from an alleged fur farm in Minnesota. The veterans use every tool at their disposal including an undercover sting and a federal lawsuit in hopes of rescuing the wolves.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for the illusive big horn sheep in the mountains of West Texas. A family near Houston reports shots from a neighboring ranch are raining down on their home. Wardens track down a bow hunter, incriminated by his own game camera.

programme.title: Movie: Abraham Lincoln: Vampire Hunter

programme.title: Movie: Kingdom of Heaven
programme.desc: After losing his family, Balian struggles to maintain his faith. He eventually grows into a leader and after meeting his father, Godfrey of Ibelin, travels to Jerusalem which is at peace, but not for long. Balian vows to protect the city with his life.

programme.title: Good Bones: Decaying Duplex Gets a Transformation
programme.desc: Mina and Karen snag a four-bedroom, two-bathroom duplex for only $4,000. But with one of the worst foundations they've ever seen combined with unsafe floor joists on the second floor, Mina expects to spend upwards of $200,000 on the renovation.

programme.title: Good Bones: Smelly Shotgun House to Chic Downtown Home
programme.desc: Mina Starsiak and Karen E. Laine take on an old shotgun-style home near downtown Indianapolis, and even though they've been renovating shotgun homes for years, this house is quite the stinker.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Little Brick House
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are tackling their first renovation of a brick house, and although it has tons of charm and character, it also has problems that need to be fixed. Plus, it's in a new neighborhood for them, which adds to the risk.

programme.title: Good Bones: Down to the Studs: Old Doors, New Wall
programme.desc: Mina and Karen work on a duplex unit that's riddled with trash and interesting surprises, including a wall made entirely out of old doors. However, further problems arise when Cory discovers a foundation issue no one saw coming.

programme.title: Good Bones: Old Biker Bar
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back on Talbott Street in Old Southside neighbourhood at a house that used to be an old motorcycle biker bar that they're turning back into a single-family home. The home will have a massive addition and pay tribute to its biker roots.

programme.title: House Hunters: Minnesota Dreamin'
programme.desc: A husband has convinced his wife to move from sunny Los Angeles to his snowy home state of Minnesota in search of affordable housing. The sticker shock from the hot market, however, is forcing some compromises neither of them expected.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Just Czech-ing in on Brno, Czech Republic
programme.desc: Desperate to purchase a forever home before the birth of their third child, Mike convinced Kathy to ditch her turnkey dreams for a reno project in Brno, Czech Republic. When we last saw them, they were in a leaky one-bedroom home.

programme.title: House Hunters: A House With Dance Space
programme.desc: A first-time buyer and part-time fire dancer is looking for a home in Washington, DC, with extra rooms to rent out. She thinks a fixer is her best bet, but her friend, and possible tenant, needs a place to live right now.

programme.title: House Hunters International: A Family Home in Hobart
programme.desc: A Washington, DC, couple that fell in love with Australia's vibe while studying abroad decided to return to the country's slower pace. Now, their lease is up and they want to buy, but they can't agree on how much to invest while she's looking for work.

programme.title: Good Bones: Duplex Remodel Is Double the Trouble
programme.desc: After purchasing a duplex for $15,000, Karen and Mina get to work turning the cramped space with two sides into a single family home. Re-imaging the floor plan is easy -- it's staying on budget that's a challenge with this project.

programme.title: Good Bones: New Clients in the Countryside
programme.desc: Mina and Karen's next home renovation project is far from a flip. This time they travel out of downtown Indianapolis and into the countryside to do a home renovation for new clients Mike and Karen Angle.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Paradise Found
programme.desc: Bryan and Sarah Baeumler, plus their four kids, travel to the Bahamas to begin the renovation of a fifty-year-old beachfront hotel. During demolition, the crew finds major termite damage.

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Renovation Island: When It Rains, It Pours
programme.desc: Bryan begins work on the two bedroom villa and the crew repairs the hotel block roof. A delayed shipment pushes back the construction schedule. And after a major rainstorm, the Baeumlers make a difficult decision about the opening date.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Power Struggle
programme.desc: Progress continues on the villas, but Bryan and Sarah butt heads over priorities. When Bryan has to leave the site for a few days, Sarah is left in charge. Adam and Bryan race the clock to pay their power bill.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Out of Gas
programme.desc: Bryan's headaches continue as he turns his attention to the pool bar. Bryan and Sarah debate design decisions in the common areas. The industrial kitchen is delayed as the team struggles with the shipping timeline. The first villa is completed.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: The Baeumlers navigate a new learning curve in hospitality as their build transitions to a business. Sarah and Bryan argue over projects that are still not finished, despite their ticking timeline.

programme.title: Jessie: No Money, Mo' Problems

programme.title: Jessie: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: When Brooks lands a job in Africa and has to be there in two days, he and Jessie are forced to move up their wedding.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Because

programme.desc: When Christy catches the eye of Candace's wealthy, charming father, Fred, Candace and Baxter are outraged, while Bonnie pushes Christy to give him a chance.

programme.desc: Christy's burgeoning relationship with Fred gets more and more difficult for Candace to handle. However, Bonnie enjoys the perks of Christy dating a wealthy man.

programme.desc: In order to avoid her ex-boyfriend, Bonnie drags Christy to a new AA meeting, only to run into her ex-girlfriend, Jeanine, from 30 years ago.

programme.desc: Christy tries to help Julian, a handsome, newly sober AA member but her attraction to him complicates things. Meanwhile, Bonnie jumps at the chance to attend a lavish charity gala with Jill.

programme.title: Mom: Diabetic Lesbians and a Blushing Bride
programme.desc: When Marjorie announces she's getting married, Christy and Bonnie are determined to make it the perfect day.

programme.title: Movie: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: When all out war breaks out between human and ape civilizations, the ape leader struggles to deal with his darkest instincts. With a brutal Colonel leading the human forces, fate draws them together to a fight that will determine the future of the world.

programme.title: Movie: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A young man with extraordinary powers must confront his alien heritage when outcast members of his race invade Earth to claim it as their new home.

programme.title: Movie: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Two authors are laughed out of academia for arguing ghosts are real. When ghosts appear to be invading Manhattan, they create a team of Ghostbusters. Together, they face an army of demons led by a ghost that can take control of human bodies.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Making of
programme.desc: This stunning series examines critical environmental and conservation issues.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Urban Wild
programme.desc: Moving beyond the wild parts of Singapore, Sir David Attenborough takes us through a day in the life of the wildlife residing in Singapore's urban environments, from civets taking up residence in roof cavities to pythons hunting in drains.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey through Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Fish
programme.desc: Witness the secret and ferocious world of the great white and sailfish, the puffer fish and barracuda, in this extraordinary journey from open ocean to coral reef and from storm-ravaged surf zone to the abyssal depths.

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Texan Mass Extinction
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Forbidden History tells true stories about treasure, conspiracies, and lost civilizations.

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Conquering Niagara
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the unlikely survival stories from people who have gone over Niagara Falls; using cutting-edge technology and the latest discoveries, experts reveal what it takes to conquer Niagara.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Curse of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case with brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigate fresh evidence to discover the truth behind this brutal death.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Conquering Niagara
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the unlikely survival stories from people who have gone over Niagara Falls; using cutting-edge technology and the latest discoveries, experts reveal what it takes to conquer Niagara.

programme.title: Mummy Unexplained Files: Curse of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The mangled mummy of a pharaoh is a 3,000-year-old cold case with brand-new leads; a team of experts in Egyptian archaeology and criminal forensics investigate fresh evidence to discover the truth behind this brutal death.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The Vatican is home to classified files that could reveal top-secret ties to the Nazis, the Mafia, and extraterrestrials. Using new evidence, experts investigate just what else is hiding in the Vatican's secret archives.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Ghost Ship Terror
programme.desc: Ghost ship sightings are frequent in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge underwater technology and witness testimony, a team of experts turn up new evidence to explain why sailors and crewmen vanish from their boats without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Doom on the Titanic
programme.desc: New discoveries are challenging everything we know about the sinking of the Titanic, revealing that the disaster wasn't caused by a freak accident and that it may have been doomed from the start.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: The Chernobyl Conspiracy
programme.desc: The Chernobyl nuclear disaster was a catastrophe that changed the course of human history, and now, new discoveries reveal the real reasons behind the explosion that spawned a deadly radioactive ghost town and brought down an empire.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: NASA's Challenger Disaster
programme.desc: NASA's Space Shuttle Challenger was a deadly disaster that changed the course of space exploration forever, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the structural failure that tore the rocket apart.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Catastrophic Collapse
programme.desc: Over 1,000 people die when an eight-story factory suddenly collapses in one the deadliest engineering disasters in modern history. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what went wrong, and how to prevent the next catastrophe.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Nightmare in Hell Valley
programme.desc: After torrential rainfall triggers a catastrophic landslide, a small village in the valley below is devastated, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the engineering that led to this fatal disaster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Control Alt Delete
programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.title: Web of Lies: New Year's Retribution
programme.desc: A newly single 33-year-old bursting with confidence after losing 200 pounds spends her time flirting with men online. When she fails to turn up for work one day, her friends worry that she didn't just run away with Mr. Right.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Devil's Pact
programme.desc: When a young mother of three plummets into depression, she turns to the internet to find comfort. What she discovers is a virtual world of fetishes and fantasies, where seemingly helpful hands hide the darkest of intentions.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Stay With Us, Madison
programme.desc: Madison Wells, a sixteen-year-old student in New Jersey, is found murdered in her aunt's kitchen. When police look into her relationship with a twenty-year-old, they go down a rabbit hole that exposes an abusive relationship with a tragic end.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Things Weigh on You
programme.desc: Jeffrey Franklin, a deaf sixteen-year-old, is dead. Now, body-cam video and original audio capture detectives' hunt for what happened. As the investigation unravels, GPS data and shocking admissions give Jeffrey the justice he desperately deserves.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Stay With Us, Madison
programme.desc: Madison Wells, a sixteen-year-old student in New Jersey, is found murdered in her aunt's kitchen. When police look into her relationship with a twenty-year-old, they go down a rabbit hole that exposes an abusive relationship with a tragic end.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Careful Who U Wish 4
programme.desc: A girl recovering from an abusive relationship looks for love on a popular dating site.

programme.title: Dead of Night: He Shouldn't Be With Us
programme.desc: A woman's attempt to flee a troubled relationship leads to her demise. Police discover a haunting message left behind, but the case goes cold for years until a prime suspect's macabre desire for blood is revealed.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Alibi Lullaby
programme.desc: Police are puzzled when a gruesome murder shakes their small town. A cryptic message is left behind at the scene, but the identity of the killer remains a mystery. Promises are broken and old secrets emerge, breathing new life into the investigation.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: A Curve in the Road
programme.desc: Wendy Kratzert's van appears to have skidded off the road, but upon a closer look, it's clear this is a homicide. As detectives trace their victim's last steps, they begin to unravel secrets in one of the strangest cases that they've ever come up against.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: First Comes Love
programme.desc: A new bride is devastated when her husband Cody Johnson disappears days after their wedding. When she reports receiving an improbable email claiming that Cody died in a hiking accident, detectives fear this blushing bride is really a black widow.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Shadow of the Steeple
programme.desc: In 2001, parishioners arrive at church, unaware that they are passing a grisly crime scene in their own parking lot. Someone has stabbed Tracey Bagwell in her car 30 times. Police soon discover that Tracey knew a secret... one worth killing for.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition that something is wrong with her daughter leads Los Angeles police to a house of horrors. Inside, they found Iana Kasian, 30, brutally murdered. Where the trail of blood led them could be the subject of a movie script or horror novel.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death of An Olympian
programme.desc: Olympic hero Dave Laut was shot six times with his own gun, his wife, Jane, pulled the trigger but says it was in self-defense. He was going to kill me, Jane tells Erin Moriarty and I didn't think I was going to live that night.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death After Midnight
programme.desc: A married mother of three was found with a single gunshot wound to her head. Unknown was how she was shot, if it was suicide or murder. The coroner ruled it a suicide but a call from a source re-opened the case with the husband arrested.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Orion Project
programme.desc: To solve a brutal triple homicide in Chatham, Ontario, Detective Peter Baker must follow the trail of missing guns.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Permission To Die
programme.desc: In this small town the death of Scott Dell looks like a suicide but when Detective Ken Leppert digs a little deeper it begins to look more like murder.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Into the Woods
programme.desc: The city of Fredericton is reeling when 8-year-old Jackie Clark goes missing. Determined to find her, Detective Mike Richards pushes the boundaries of police protocol.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Bad Man
programme.desc: A young couple is bludgeoned in their own home and the only witness, the woman's three-year-old son. With nothing else to go on, detective Don Forgan begins a series of interviews with the witness with hopes it leads to a break in the case.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Escaping the Kill Room
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned Double Agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: Reagan's KGB Agent
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell,' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet Spy war.

programme.title: Spies Declassified: The Honey Trap
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat; ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill it's Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.desc: A couple enlists the crew to build a log chapel which will be used as a venue for weddings in Waynesboro, Virginia. Later, Mark tours an old Texas church and visits a 1795 log-built bed and breakfast.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Adapt and Overcome in Hamlin, WV
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders never give up, and despite some rough going early on, this one turns out to be worth all the extra effort. Mark goes on a cross-country search for replacement logs while the team pulls the cabin apart without sacrificing logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: In Merrie's Memory
programme.desc: Joe and Merrie Colvard dreamed of having an antique log cabin. But only a few weeks after they picked one out on the Boneyard, tragedy struck and Merrie unexpectedly passed away. Joe is determined to build the cabin in his late wife's honour.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a West Virginia Smokehouse Into a Modern Bunkhouse in the Florida Swamp
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take down a West Virginia smokehouse and a half-barn nearby. They weave the logs together in Florida to create a bunkhouse for their client's kids.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ Sandwiches
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Barbecue Exchange for two delicious sandwiches - one is called heaven and the other is called hell. They're both packed with pulled pork and bacon. Then it's off to KayJoe's BBQ in Centreville, Tennessee.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Foods in Jamaica
programme.desc: The search for fire and food takes us to Jamaica where we make a beeline for Scotchies's Too, a restaurant famous for cooking jerk pork and chicken.

programme.desc: Mira and her friends find a treasure map that leads to the mysterious tunnels under the palace. A mystery polo player appears while Mira and her team are playing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Bluey: Hammerbarn / Feather Wand / Dance Mode
programme.desc: While on a trip to the store, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. Later, when Bingo isn't invited to Chloe's party, she uses a magic feather wand to make things incredibly heavy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Who Let the Moths In? / Commander Meow
programme.desc: The moths infiltrate HQ, and Gekko won’t admit that he let them in until it is too late. Catboy realizes that a true Cat Explorer puts his team before the discovery.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Meet An Yu

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged: Two Close Friends / Mr. Bigby's Big Night
programme.desc: Mickey and Donald accidentally become handcuffed together. Later, the happy helpers help Mr. Bigby throw a birthday party for his wife.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Silly Problem

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Clarabelle's Clubhouse Carnival
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends put on a fun carnival.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elephant Tracks
programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.desc: Wichita residents live in fear that they will be a killer's next victim.

programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.desc: Josh travels all over the US to find the treasures featured in The Secret, a 1980s book filled with devilishly difficult riddles and puzzles that have stumped treasure hunters for over three decades.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Josh heads to his hometown, where one of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, may have been solved.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Like, Totally Josh
programme.desc: Josh's HQ becomes a time machine to a totally tubular decade as he interviews Back to the Future's Lea Thompson and Bill and Ted's Alex Winter. He also looks to pry clues to The Secret from the man who created the illustrations, John Jude Palencar.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: NASA's Lost Treasure
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the whereabouts of a lost relic of the Space Age that tarnished the reputation of NASA's first astronauts; as cutting-edge technology turns up brand-new evidence, experts might finally vindicate this American hero.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Chaos Before the Storm
programme.desc: Winter is approaching yet the Wolfpack is feeling the heat! Bear works furiously to finalize an addition to his home as Billy faces a new medical crisis. A big winter storm forces Noah and Rhain Alisha to make a tough decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Push
programme.desc: The Brown siblings struggle to finish their ambitious homesites as the ground begins to freeze. Later, the Wolfpack gets the call that Rhain-Alisha has gone into labor and races to the birth of baby Eli.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Wind and Water
programme.desc: The Brown Family kicks off their most ambitious plan to conquer the mountain yet. Bear and the siblings throw caution to the wind on a critical first project disassembling and transporting a salvaged 50-foot windmill.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Janine
programme.desc: A year since her weight loss journey began, Janine is still in the 500s and mostly immobile, and now, Dr. Nowzaradan is running out of options for how to treat her if she can't find a way to control her eating habit and start walking again.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: The First 48: Best Laid Plans/ Burned Alive

programme.title: The First 48: The Boogie Man/ Murder on Flowering Peach

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Inspiration
programme.desc: Amy explores inspiration, the place where ideas come from. She reveals the person who inspired her to become a hostess, but a surprise guest forces her to reconsider everything.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Inspiration
programme.desc: Amy explores inspiration, the place where ideas come from. She reveals the person who inspired her to become a hostess, but a surprise guest forces her to reconsider everything.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat

programme.desc: Learn which trick Michael has been performing since he was a child, who embarked on a 21-day juice diet cleanse and what moment had everyone on set erupting with laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Out for Blood
programme.desc: It's the start of deer season, and the Texas woods are filled with hunters trying to bag a prize buck. Game Wardens are busy checking hunters across the state, while also investigating a rash of deer stand thefts, and rescuing a trio of baby hawks.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Chase on the Border

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Chasin' Goose, Catchin' Gator

programme.desc: When an illegal turkey kill is reported, Officer Hannett and Lt. Boudreau join forces to find the culprit. Officer Bronson responds to a man who discovered a snake in his bed, and Officer Delmer handles a turkey poaching case.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: When Maine's wildlife wanders into human territory, it's game wardens to the rescue. Wardens Marquis and Fitzpatrick try to catch a dumpster-diving bear. A wily woodchuck gives Warden Lounder a run for his money.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Wildlife Round Up
programme.desc: Texas wildlife keeps the wardens on their toes when they must relocate a large herd of pronghorn, investigate the killing of an endangered rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On Thin Ice

programme.title: North Woods Law: Maine Freeze

programme.desc: Turf, the 'wildlife control officer' for the Seahawks, is a working dog with messy habits. Antonio helps his owners turn their laundry room into a fully operational doggy spa and transforms the lackluster backyard into a football-themed doggy paradise.

programme.desc: Antonio helps a family who opened their home to neighbourhood dogs create the ultimate backyard dog park with cool, custom dog houses. It has a paddling pool for hot days and a structure of ramps and tunnels to keep everyone entertained and active.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: A Backyard to Drool For

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Tricked Out Cat Castle
programme.desc: Designer Antonio Ballatore and team build a tricked-out, cats-only treehouse.

programme.desc: Antonio meets a family with two bearded dragons stuck in a tank in mom's bedroom. Antonio's solution: a backyard, temperature-controlled dragon clubhouse with separate self-sustaining tanks, a common climbing area, and a cool hangout spot for the family.

programme.desc: Becky and Junior want to make their income property home.

programme.desc: Mason and Shannon moved into their 2,000 square foot home in a neighborhood perfect to raise their young son, Luke. After adopting their teenage daughter, Carmen, they felt as though their house may be a little too small for a family of four.

programme.title: Love It or List It: All About That Basement
programme.desc: A couple loves their mid-century modern ranch home with its charm and close proximity to downtown, but they are starting to feel like their family is outgrowing the home and wish they had a more functional space.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Kitchen Catastrophe
programme.desc: Chris and Maria moved into their home with two kids, but now with four children, the house and its tiny kitchen feel cramped and cluttered. Maria wants a home with a gourmet kitchen closer to her work to shorten her commute.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Betting the Horse Farm
programme.desc: Their family home on a more-than-five-acres horse farm is a dream for this horse lover but her city-raised husband has had all he can take.

programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Fish

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.desc: Dr. Pol and the clinic are encountering a shocking set of cases.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dairy Poppins
programme.desc: There is truly no rest for the cold and weary vets of PVS during the winter season.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: What's Moo With Ewe?
programme.desc: It's a hectic week for Pol Veterinary Services as the staff sees a slew of emergencies, reunions, and ruffled feathers.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Homecoming
programme.desc: As the ice and snow melt across the Arctic, Alaskans take advantage of the warm season.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Super Factories: McLaren Supercar
programme.desc: McLaren's high-tech production center is as remarkably distinctive as the handcrafted automobiles they design and produce, overtaking its supercar rivals through the application of Formula One science and sophisticated production standards.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Pig Farm Fracture
programme.desc: Paramedics and airborne doctors of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance crew go to the rescue of a teenage boy who fell through the roof of a barn, fracturing his skull. Also, the chopper touches down to aide a student in a serious bicycling accident.

programme.title: Super Factories: McLaren Supercar
programme.desc: McLaren's high-tech production center is as remarkably distinctive as the handcrafted automobiles they design and produce, overtaking its supercar rivals through the application of Formula One science and sophisticated production standards.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Pig Farm Fracture
programme.desc: Paramedics and airborne doctors of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance crew go to the rescue of a teenage boy who fell through the roof of a barn, fracturing his skull. Also, the chopper touches down to aide a student in a serious bicycling accident.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Chernobyl's Toughest Fix
programme.desc: The Chernobyl disaster created one of the world's deadliest places, and as the temporary fix around the damaged reactor begins to fail, engineers race to build a cutting-edge structure to contain the contamination that could threaten the world.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Freak of the Deep
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover an unknown monster thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Killer fog threatens a town in the American Midwest. A truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibals in the Ghost City
programme.desc: An abandoned city in the African jungle might have a bloody past of malevolent spirits and cannibals. Mount Vesuvius shows signs that it's awakening, and the mafia could be to blame. Experts investigate Hitler's secret Nazi UFO program.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding King Arthur
programme.desc: An abandoned megacity in a remote jungle might be the home of an ancient treasure and a dark secret. When a mysterious circular stone structure is discovered in Scotland, experts investigate whether it's the fabled Round Table of King Arthur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Monsters of Diamond Desert
programme.desc: An abandoned ghost town in a remote desert with a dark past. When a strange facility is spotted in Russia, experts investigate if it's hiding evidence of alien life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: She Said...
programme.desc: When a terrified sex worker asks Detective Penny Hart for help, she knows it must be serious. Things quickly intensify when the same frightened informant goes missing and is feared to be dead.

programme.title: See No Evil: Goodnight Jessika
programme.desc: On September 7th, 2009, 27-year-old Jessika Kalaher is found strangled in her car in Cedar Park, Texas. With her wallet and car keys missing, detectives turn to security cameras to answer who and why.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dead Ringer
programme.desc: A family man targeted for death lives to climb out of his own 'grave.' Go inside the sting that took down a hit man-for-hire scheme.

programme.title: See No Evil: Manhunt
programme.desc: When loving couple Gary and Linda Haas fail to reach their vacation campsite, New Mexico State Police are called in to investigate. With no forensic evidence and no witnesses, all they can do is scour CCTV footage for clues to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The House Hermit
programme.desc: The investigation into the deaths of a Toronto couple leads a detective to uncover a pattern of escalating crimes that suggest a serial killer is operating in cottage country.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Manhunt
programme.desc: When loving couple Gary and Linda Haas fail to reach their vacation campsite, New Mexico State Police are called in to investigate. With no forensic evidence and no witnesses, all they can do is scour CCTV footage for clues to unravel the mystery.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The House Hermit
programme.desc: The investigation into the deaths of a Toronto couple leads a detective to uncover a pattern of escalating crimes that suggest a serial killer is operating in cottage country.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Cold-Blooded Killer
programme.desc: A father goes hunting in a Florida lake and vanishes. Many people thought he was eaten by alligators, but not his mother. Seventeen years later, a stunning confession proves she was right all along.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: When an eight-year old girl is found strangled to death, a local woman is instrumental in helping detectives bring the girl's brutal killer to justice.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2005, a 28 year-old photographer and college student is found murdered in his Arlington, Texas apartment. Investigators suspect that the victim's generosity and willingness to help those in need may have lead a killer to his door.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Dash Cam Never Saw
programme.desc: It is a story that made national headlines: a young Oklahoma City police officer accused of preying on women in the very community he was sworn to serve and protect.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: ABC News Correspondent Linzie Janis speaks exclusively to Nathan Carman about his rescue from the ill-fated fishing trip that claimed his mother Linda's life.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Everybody Loves Rick
programme.desc: Most high school love ends in heartbreak - but not Richard and Jolena's. Years later, their love is rekindled - but one of them is married to someone else. Tempers flare, trust is betrayed and one in the triangle will end up dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bored to Death
programme.desc: When Opal Skidmore marries Steven Williams, their love is a second chance for the pair to live out their dreams. Until boredom and the lure of the open road spark hidden desires and sexual hijinks leaving this open marriage anything but happy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Marina
programme.desc: Ed is a retired pilot whose sense of adventure is reawakened by a seaside encounter with the much-younger Denise. The couple sets up an idyllic life on a boat in a Florida marina until a sudden change in fortune rocks the couple's romantic seas forever.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Luther is a minister's son who falls hard for a pastor's daughter, Anita. With love and faith, they make it work until the work runs out. And the crushing blow of failure turns heaven-on-earth into a bloody hell.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Orphans
programme.desc: For these women blood isn't thicker than water. A teen sacrifices her family for an early inheritance; an obsession with Hollywood memorabilia leads a recluse to kill her parents; and a soccer mom's social status is more important than her mother's life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Tangle
programme.desc: These deadly women liked company when they killed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Terminate
programme.desc: When it came to murder, these women thought two minds were better than one. They were the masterminds, but didn't want to get their hands dirty. For these Deadly Women, it took 'Two to Terminate.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: American Nazis
programme.desc: From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorize the United States in the 1930s and wage a battle against the FBI and an undercover team of amateur spies.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.desc: The builders have never seen a log home as large as this Ohio cabin. They discovery it's filled with history, craftsmanship and a lot of cherished memories. Mark also gives the cabin owner tips on how to convert the bar into a modern home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Piece En Piece

programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.
